Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Okay, first I need to analyze each case separately to see how the same activity name is used differently. So the naming should reflect whether its initial, re-, or physical.

Text: For Call Customer, C001 is because documents were missing, C002 has two calls - one for clarification and one for confirmation, C003 is to recall the customer. So the naming should indicate the purpose: missing docs, clarification, confirmation, or recall.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The other activities like Initiate Request and Approve Request are unique per case, so they dont need renaming. Adjust Account appears in C002 and C003 but with different contexts - one after clarification call, one due to missing info - so I should differentiate those too.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
